title: Rename mode buttons to English and add scroll to bottom panel

requirements.summary: Rename ModeSelector button labels from Russian to English with fixed widths to prevent layout shift
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Intent' button label reads exactly 'Intent' (not 'По намерениям')
Both buttons have equal, fixed widths so no layout shift occurs when toggling between them
The sidebar layout does not overflow or wrap unexpectedly with the new labels

file_operations.description: Change the mode button labels from 'Глобальный' to 'Global' and 'По намерениям' to 'Intent'. Apply fixed or min-width CSS classes (e.g., w-32 or min-w-[8rem]) to both buttons to ensure consistent sizing and prevent layout shifts when toggling between modes.

requirements.summary: Add vertical scroll to the bottom data panel containing Triplets, Taxonomy, and Ontology tabs
acceptanceCriteria: The bottom panel container has a defined max-height (e.g., a fixed pixel value or viewport-relative value)
When content in the Triplets tab exceeds the panel height, a vertical scrollbar appears and all rows are accessible by scrolling
When content in the Taxonomy tab exceeds the panel height, a vertical scrollbar appears and the full tree is accessible by scrolling
When content in the Ontology tab exceeds the panel height, a vertical scrollbar appears and all entries are accessible by scrolling
The scrollbar styling is consistent with the existing dark theme

file_operations.description: Add a max-height constraint and overflow-y-auto to the bottom panel container that wraps the Triplets, Taxonomy, and Ontology tab content. Use a viewport-relative value (e.g., max-h-[40vh] or max-h-96) and the overflow-y-auto Tailwind class to enable vertical scrolling when content exceeds the panel height. Ensure the scrollable container wraps all tab content so that each tab's data is independently scrollable.
